I believe the apples are Golden Delicious variety.  They are definitely delicious when they are tree ripened.

Located on Patuxent River Navy base so CAC card is required for access. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-November.

There is a good selection of persimmons surrounding this pond.  There are about a dozen trees but 2 of them are superb... 

This is on Patuxent River Navy base so this is only for CAC card owners. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: October-November.
